title: Clear Light (Inner Radiance / Dharmakaya)
description: The luminous ground of being that dawns at the moment of death when all 80 instinctual conceptual patterns have ceased. In the Tibetan system, it is the 'Mother radiance' — the Dharmakaya itself. If recognized, liberation is achieved directly. If missed, the soul enters the Chonyid Bardo of peaceful and wrathful deities.
